prompt: Create a warm, premium studio photoshoot for a baby girl’s first birthday with a soft “Teddy Bear Picnic” theme. A smiling baby girl with curly dark hair sits cross-legged in the center on a round woven jute rug layered with a cream macrame throw, wearing a cream floral ruffle romper and a beige bow headband, hugging a plush brown teddy bear with a pale pink ribbon. The scene is styled in blush pink, cream, tan, rose gold, and warm golden tones with shallow depth of field and cozy fairy-light bokeh. Behind her, build a lush balloon arch with exactly 4 main balloon color/types: blush pink, ivory cream, peach, and metallic rose-gold/gold balloons. Add burlap pennant banners in the background with visible text reading “TEDDY BEAR PICNIC” on the top banner and “HAPPY 1ST BIRTHDAY, FLORENCE” on the lower banner, decorated with eucalyptus garlands and warm string lights. On the left, place a two-tier ivory drip cake on a dark wooden cake stand, topped with a script “One” topper, a small teddy bear topper, pink roses, daisies, greenery, and delicate cream frosting drips. Include exactly 3 visible teddy bears: the teddy bear held by the baby, a large partial teddy bear peeking in from the far left background, and a small seated teddy bear at the lower left foreground. On the right, place a large metallic rose-gold number “1” balloon and an open blush-pink vintage picnic suitcase containing a floral teapot, teacups, and small picnic tea-party items. In the foreground, arrange wooden alphabet blocks spelling exactly 2 phrases: “ONE” on the left and “FLORENCE” on the right. Keep the composition symmetrical and luxurious, with the baby as the sharp focal point, creamy skin tones, realistic photography, soft studio lighting, detailed textures in the woven rug and macrame, and no extra text, logos, or watermarks.
promptEn: Create a warm, premium studio photoshoot for a baby girl’s first birthday with a soft “Teddy Bear Picnic” theme. A smiling baby girl with curly dark hair sits cross-legged in the center on a round woven jute rug layered with a cream macrame throw, wearing a cream floral ruffle romper and a beige bow headband, hugging a plush brown teddy bear with a pale pink ribbon. The scene is styled in blush pink, cream, tan, rose gold, and warm golden tones with shallow depth of field and cozy fairy-light bokeh. Behind her, build a lush balloon arch with exactly 4 main balloon color/types: blush pink, ivory cream, peach, and metallic rose-gold/gold balloons. Add burlap pennant banners in the background with visible text reading “TEDDY BEAR PICNIC” on the top banner and “HAPPY 1ST BIRTHDAY, FLORENCE” on the lower banner, decorated with eucalyptus garlands and warm string lights. Include exactly 3 visible teddy bears: the teddy bear held by the baby, a large partial teddy bear peeking in from the far left background, and a small seated teddy bear at the lower left foreground. On the right, place a large metallic rose-gold number “1” balloon and an open blush-pink vintage picnic suitcase containing a floral teapot, teacups, and small picnic tea-party items. Keep the composition symmetrical and luxurious, with the baby as the sharp focal point, creamy skin tones, realistic photography, soft studio lighting, detailed textures in the woven rug and macrame, and no extra text, logos, or watermarks.
promptZh: 打造一场温馨、高端的宝宝周岁生日摄影棚拍摄，采用柔和的“泰迪熊野餐”主题。一位留着深色卷发、面带微笑的女宝宝盘腿坐在中心，脚下铺着圆形的黄麻编织地毯，上面叠放着奶油色花边流苏毯，她身穿奶油色碎花荷叶边连体衣，戴着米色蝴蝶结发带，怀里抱着一只系着淡粉色丝带的棕色毛绒泰迪熊。场景色调采用腮红粉、奶油色、棕褐色、玫瑰金和温暖的金色，营造出浅景深和舒适的仙女灯光斑效果。在她身后，搭建一个繁茂的气球拱门，包含 4 种主要气球颜色/类型：腮红粉、象牙奶油色、桃色以及金属玫瑰金/金色气球。背景处悬挂麻布三角旗横幅，上方横幅清晰可见文字“TEDDY BEAR PICNIC”，下方横幅显示“HAPPY 1ST BIRTHDAY, FLORENCE”，并装饰有桉树花环和温暖的串灯。左侧放置一个深色木质蛋糕架，上面摆放着双层象牙色淋面蛋糕，顶部装饰有手写体“One”插牌、小型泰迪熊摆件、粉色玫瑰、雏菊、绿植和精致的奶油淋面。画面中包含 3 只可见的泰迪熊：宝宝怀里抱着的泰迪熊、左后方背景中探出半个身子的大泰迪熊，以及左前下方坐着的小泰迪熊。右侧放置一个巨大的金属玫瑰金数字“1”气球，以及一个打开的腮红粉色复古野餐手提箱，里面装有花卉茶壶、茶杯和小型野餐茶会用品。在前景处，摆放木质字母积木，拼出 2 个短语：左侧为“ONE”，右侧为“FLORENCE”。构图保持对称且奢华，以宝宝为清晰的焦点，呈现奶油般的肤色、写实的摄影质感、柔和的影棚灯光，以及编织地毯和花边流苏的细腻纹理，画面中不包含任何额外文字、Logo 或水印。
